_meta.keyKnowledge: We learn how feelings and good habits like honesty and kindness shape how we see right and wrong.

_source.w: We learn how feelings and good habits like honesty and kindness shape how we see right and wrong.
y: Our feelings affect the choices we make — understanding this helps us choose wisely.
Honesty and kindness are habits that make life better for everyone.
Knowing that emotions influence our thinking helps us pause and think before acting.
eg: We talk about how feeling angry might make us do something we regret.
We explore what honesty looks like — telling the truth even when it is hard.
We discuss how being kind makes our classroom a better place.
We read a story where a character's feelings led to a bad choice.
We practise noticing our feelings before deciding what to do.
We share examples of when being kind or honest made a difference.
